# {{ site.title }}

> {{ site.description }}

{{ site.data.llms.intro }}

## Docs
{% assign docs = site.html_pages | where_exp: "p", "p.title" | where_exp: "p", "p.url != '/'" | sort: "nav_order" -%}
{% for p in docs -%}
- [{{ p.title }}]({{ p.url | replace: '/', '' | prepend: '/' | append: '.md' | absolute_url }}){% if p.description %}: {{ p.description }}{% endif %}
{% endfor %}

## Schemas
{{ site.data.llms.schemas_intro }}
{% assign schemas = site.static_files | where_exp: "f", "f.path contains '/schemas/0.1/'" | sort: "name" -%}
{% for f in schemas -%}
- [{{ f.name }}]({{ f.path | absolute_url }})
{% endfor %}
